name: Series and Parallel Resistor Combinations
description: Simplify resistor networks by identifying series and parallel combinations and calculating equivalent resistance
identification_signal: Circuit diagrams with multiple resistors that can be simplified step by step

strategy.step_1: Identify resistors in series (same current) or parallel (same voltage)
strategy.step_4: Repeat until single equivalent resistance remains

front.text: Resistors connected end-to-end with single path

back.title: Series Connection
back.explanation: Same current through all. R_eq = R₁ + R₂ + ...

front.text: Resistors connected across same two points

steps.title: Identify Combination Type
steps.instruction: Series: one path, current must flow through all. Parallel: multiple paths, same endpoints.

steps.title: Calculate Equivalent
steps.instruction: Series: add resistances. Parallel: add reciprocals, then invert.

checkpoint.question: Does parallel R_eq make sense?
checkpoint.answer: Should be less than smallest resistor
